author: felvesthe
description: Lock notes to open in preview mode by default.

manifest.author: Felvesthe
manifest.description: Lock notes to open in preview mode by default.
manifest.name: Note Locker

name: Note Locker

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changelog v1.3.1 (30.11.2025)

- Bring back old behavior for entering edit mode on normally locked notes as default
- Make editing prevention optional for normally locked notes

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changelog v1.3.0 (23.11.2025)

- Folder lock feature (https://github.com/Felvesthe/Note-Locker/issues/4)
- Possibility to lock/unlock multiple notes at once (https://github.com/Felvesthe/Note-Locker/issues/5)
- Strict Lock feature (https://github.com/Felvesthe/Note-Locker/issues/6)
- Some other code improvements

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changelog v1.2.1 (16.05.2025)

- Fix lock icon visibility after folder expansion

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changelog v1.2.0 (11.05.2025)

- Restored separate notification length settings for mobile & desktop (fixes sync issues caused by the unified setting)
- Auto-hide irrelevant notification length settings
- Observe entire file explorer to properly display lock icons
- Added toggle for note lock/unlock notifications in settings

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changelog v1.1.0 (09.05.2025)

- Added settings panel
- Unified mobile / desktop notification max length setting (configurable in settings)
- New option: Lock / Unlock icon in status bar
- New option: Show lock icon next to locked note name
- Option to set a hotkey for locking/unlocking notes in Settings -> Hotkeys -> Note Locker: Toggle Lock for current note
- Exclude "Lock" option in context menu for folders

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# 🔒 Note Locker  
A simple Obsidian plugin to protect important notes from accidental changes by locking them in preview mode.
